message:
feat(fp-frame): add assign_fn, applymap_na_action, and isin_dict methods

assign_fn(): Implements pandas df.assign(col=lambda df: ...) pattern, where
each closure receives a reference to the current DataFrame (including columns
assigned earlier in the same call). This enables chained computed columns
where later assignments can depend on earlier ones within a single call.

applymap_na_action(): Implements df.applymap(func, na_action='ignore') by
applying the transformation function only to non-missing values, passing
NaN/Null through unchanged. This prevents errors from attempting arithmetic
on missing sentinels and matches pandas' na_action='ignore' behavior.

isin_dict(): Implements df.isin({'col': [v1, v2], ...}) with per-column
value sets. Each column is tested against its own allowed-value list, and
columns not present in the mapping get all-False. Missing values match if
the allowed set contains a missing sentinel, matching pandas NaN-in-set
semantics.

All three methods include comprehensive tests covering chained dependencies,
missing value handling, multi-column operation, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
